title: Slip-Cast Ceramic Ocarina (OCA-001) - V5 explorer candidate

readiness.measurement_status: chamber volume, voicing, shrinkage, and tuning require physical measurement

release_gates: Measure fired clay shrinkage before freezing the master scale factor.
Measure water-fill chamber volume at greenware, bisque, and glaze-fire stages.
Validate fipple response, windway gap, labium edge, and all-closed pitch on OCA-P0/OCA-P1.
Record measured frequencies and cents errors before promoting the 12-hole layout.
Export/review DXF or production CAD only after empirical voicing validation.
notes: Generated images are concept/support assets only and are not fabrication authority.
The installed acoustic-law validator does not expose a Helmholtz vessel-flute vocabulary value, so family-spec.csv uses measurement-required planning rows and keeps the Helmholtz caveat in prose.
